model._hint: Base: stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0. LoRA: blink7630/storyboard-sketch (trained on 60 grayscale storyboard images at 21:9, 16:9 and 1:1 aspect ratios). ~6 GB SDXL + LoRA; sequential_cpu_offload recommended on ≤16 GB.

lora._hint: 1.0 = most abstract sketch style; 0.8 = best balance of style + coherence; 0.5 = more detailed/realistic.

generation._hint: 30 steps is sufficient. More steps do not noticeably improve sketch quality. | CFG 7–8. Higher values increase prompt adherence but can over-sharpen lines. | 21:9 (1344×576) and 16:9 (1344×768) match training data aspect ratios. SDXL native 1024×1024 also works.

system._hint: ~6 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: enabled (required for large models)

notes.about: Generates grayscale storyboard sketches in the style of film and TV pre-production artwork — loose gestural lines, rough shading, and the functional visual language of professional storyboards.
notes.prompt_guide: TRIGGER WORD REQUIRED: every prompt must start with 'storyboard sketch of ...'. Examples: 'storyboard sketch of a hero running through a burning building', 'storyboard sketch of two characters arguing in a kitchen', 'storyboard sketch of a spaceship landing on an alien planet'.
